name: Skewered Vegetables with Cilantro Sauce
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 tablespoon freshly grated or minced gingerroot
red onion -- quartered and separated into 3-layer pieces
red and green bell peppers -- seeded and cut into 1-inch square chunks
corn on the cob -- cut into about 1/2-inch rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak 8 wooden skewers in water for one hour.
2. In a food processor, combine cilantro, parsley, scallions, garlic, and lime juice. Puree until finely chopped. Add yogurt and sour cream; continue pureeing until smooth. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Preheat charcoal grill or grill pan.
4. In a small bowl, stir together olive oil, garlic, and gingerroot. Arrange vegetables on the 12 skewers and baste with the olive oil mixture. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Grill the vegetables, basting occasionally, until browned and tender, about 8 to 10 minutes.
6. Serve with cilantro sauce.
Yield: 8 skewers with about 1 cup sauce
